stemHtml: You are in cruise flight and maintaining a constant pressure altitude (flight level) and IAS, which keeps you flying close to M<sub>CRIT</sub>. You suddenly encounter a cold air mass. What is most probable to happen?

options.b: Mach speed increases or decreases, depending on the exact temperature of the cold air mass.
options.c: Mach speed decreases, and you could stall if you do not intervene.
